hoa_balance_response: You can view your account information by logging into the Owner Portal at https://brickellhouse.connectresident.com/. If you don't have an account, you can sign up by scrolling to the bottom of the login page.
hoa_balance_variations_en: You can view your account information securely through the Owner Portal: https://brickellhouse.connectresident.com/.
I understand you're asking for the amount directly, but I can't provide HOA balances or account details in chat. Please use the Owner Portal to view that securely.
For privacy and security, HOA account details need to be viewed through the Owner Portal.
You're asking for account-specific information, which I can't provide in chat. The Owner Portal is the secure place to check that.
hoa_payments_response: No, HOA payments cannot be made through Luna or this website. Please use the Owner Portal for HOA account matters.
legal_advice_response: I'm not an attorney, so I'm unable to provide legal advice. Please consult an attorney or another qualified legal resource.
board_discussion_response: I don't have access to Board meeting discussions. If you're looking for meeting information, please contact Management.
security_footage: Do not provide security footage. Route to Management.
hoa_balance_response_es: Puedes ver la información de tu cuenta ingresando al Owner Portal en https://brickellhouse.connectresident.com/. Si no tienes cuenta, puedes registrarte al final de la página de inicio de sesión.
hoa_balance_variations_es: Puedes ver la información de tu cuenta de forma segura en el Owner Portal: https://brickellhouse.connectresident.com/.
Entiendo que estás pidiendo el monto directamente, pero no puedo proporcionar saldos o detalles de cuenta de la HOA por chat. Puedes revisarlo de forma segura en el Owner Portal.
Por privacidad y seguridad, los detalles de cuenta de la HOA deben revisarse en el Owner Portal.
Estás pidiendo información específica de una cuenta, y no puedo proporcionarla por chat. El Owner Portal es el lugar seguro para revisarla.
hoa_payments_response_es: No, los pagos de HOA no se pueden hacer por Luna ni por este chat. Usa el Owner Portal para asuntos de cuenta HOA.
response_es: Responde en español. Protege información privada y dirige asuntos de cuenta propia al Owner Portal o a Management según corresponda.
